title: hieracium onosmoides subsp. tolosanum
intro: Hieracium onosmoides subsp. tolosanum, also known as the tolosan hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium onosmoides subsp. tolosanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
